description: One top-level JSON object property. Property order and the complete raw JSON value are durable snapshot fields.

key.description: The decoded top-level object member name.

order_key.description: A stable fractional order key for the object member.

value_json.description: The complete valid JSON value encoded as text. Keeping it in a string preserves arbitrary JSON values while the production packet-v1 durable snapshot remains number-free.
